title: Phase 31BY -- Qwen2.5-1.5B Corrected Q2_K Aggregate Planning / Stop-Go Decision
scope: PLANNING-ONLY phase. Produces a stop/go decision for the next executable phase. No aggregate validation, no full 28-layer sweep, no generation/inference, no llama.cpp runtime integration, no Q2_K/SDIR artifact generation, no model files committed, no performance/quality/runtime claims.
forbidden_actions_upheld: no aggregate validation execution in this phase
no full 28-layer sweep execution in this phase
no full-model runtime memory savings claim
no Q2_K / SDIR blobs generated or committed
no commit/push/tag without explicit Matt approval

31BU.result: 3/3 memory-positive, 3/3 cosine-improved, 3/3 MAE-improved, 0 severe, all finite

31BV.result: 6/6 memory-positive, 6/6 cosine-improved, 6/6 MAE-improved, 0 severe, all finite

31BX.result: 14/14 memory-positive, 14/14 cosine-improved, 14/14 MAE-improved, 0 severe, all finite

options_considered.name: GO full 28-layer x 2-seed aggregate
options_considered.purpose: full layer coverage at the same two deterministic seeds used in 31BV/31BX; bounded standalone tensor-harness aggregate

options_considered.name: GO 28-layer x 1-seed aggregate first
options_considered.purpose: lower-cost full layer coverage before 56-pair aggregate

options_considered.name: MORE SEED SENSITIVITY before full aggregate
options_considered.purpose: check activation/seed sensitivity on representative layers before full aggregate

options_considered.name: STOP / FREEZE current 1.5B probe evidence
options_considered.purpose: no further 1.5B validation for now; move to writeup/package, stale-file cleanup, or next architecture lane

cost_risk_table.cost_model_caveat: 31BX wall-clock observed at ~9 minutes for 14 pairs in a single process. Per-pair cost is dominated by one-time model dequantize on first layer touch; subsequent layers amortize the load. So per-run cost grows sub-linearly with pair count when pairs are run in a single process. Estimates below are: working = realistic best estimate, upper = conservative ceiling.

rows.claim_boundary_if_pass: stratified-aggregate standalone tensor-harness pass; memory-positive + cosine/MAE improved on the majority of 28 layers x 2 seeds; no runtime/inference/generation claim
rows.claim_boundary_if_fail: PARTIAL classification; per-layer failure map recorded; no aggregate-quality or behavior claim
rows.scope_creep_risk: low if scope is locked to layers 0-27, seeds {0, 9}, no ffn_down residual, no FP16 W_ref, no runtime

rows.claim_boundary_if_pass: single-seed full-layer aggregate; weaker than Option A because seed sensitivity not tested
rows.claim_boundary_if_fail: PARTIAL classification; per-layer failure map recorded
rows.scope_creep_risk: low; essentially a budget-cut version of A

rows.crosses_into_aggregate_validation: false -- still stratified by layer subset
rows.claim_boundary_if_pass: seed-sensitivity map on representative layers; does not yield full-layer coverage
rows.claim_boundary_if_fail: would re-open which layers to include in any future aggregate
rows.scope_creep_risk: moderate; would add 6 more seeds but not increase layer coverage from 7 -> 28

selected_next_executable_phase.name: Phase 31BZ -- Qwen2.5-1.5B Corrected Q2_K Full-Layer Two-Seed Aggregate
selected_next_executable_phase.type: standalone tensor-harness aggregate; NOT generation; NOT inference; NOT llama.cpp runtime integration
rationale: 31BU (L0 only, 3 seeds), 31BV (L0/L14/L27, 2 seeds), and 31BX (L0/L4/L8/L12/L16/L20/L27, 2 seeds) are all clean. Three independent runners, 23 total pairs, 0 severe, 0 memory-fail, 0 finite-fail.
31BX covered 7 of 28 layers (25%) with mean delta_cos +0.00464 and worst pair (L16-S9) still at +0.000652 -- strongly positive.
31BX per-layer margin variance is 32 bytes (3380342 to 3380374) -- essentially constant; the residual accounting is numerically stable across the layers observed.
L0 result is bit-identical across 31BU, 31BV, and 31BX (3 independent runners) -- reproducibility is verified, not assumed.
The two seeds 0 and 9 used in 31BV/31BX are sufficient to catch the worst-case 'all-bad-on-this-seed' failure mode for a corrected Q2_K policy on a Gaussian-activation harness.

31BW planning already selected this exact 7-layer subset as the bridge from 'anchor only' to 'aggregate candidate'; 31BX executed and passed it. The next bounded step is to extend to all 28 layers at the same two seeds.

Step ladder is controlled: anchor (1 layer) -> small multi-layer (3 layers) -> stratified (7 layers) -> full-layer aggregate (28 layers). Each rung ran under the same policy, same runner family, same harness, same W_ref source.

Option B (28 layers x 1 seed) is strictly weaker than Option A at comparable cost (25 vs 16 minutes); the marginal 4 seeds worth of pairs (28 more pairs) is justified by the existing ladder's reproducibility evidence.

Option C (more seeds) does not increase layer coverage (still 4 layers out of 28 = 14%), so it does not move the project from stratified to full-layer evidence; layer coverage is the more important unknown than seed sensitivity at this point.

Option D (freeze) is unjustified: the worst observed pair is still strongly positive (delta_cos +0.000652, MAE_delta -0.004184) and 0 failures across 23 cumulative pairs, so there is no current signal that the policy is misbehaving on any layer.

success_criteria_for_31BZ.CLEAN_definition_strict: CLEAN classification requires ALL of the following simultaneously. The 2-pair allowance applies ONLY to the two soft thresholds listed under 'soft_thresholds_with_2_pair_allowance'. All other criteria are HARD -- 1 violation of any of them disqualifies CLEAN.
hard_criteria_no_allowance: regression passes before and after (PASS_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_RUNTIME_CLEAN, error_count=0, fallback_count=0, readme_drift_guard.passed=true)
56/56 finite (n_finite == 56). Any non-finite pair disqualifies CLEAN -- see stop_conditions_for_31BZ.severity_routing.non_finite for the appropriate PARTIAL/BLOCKED classification.
56/56 memory-positive (n_memory_positive == 56). Any memory-negative pair/layer disqualifies CLEAN -- classification is PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_MEMORY_FAIL, period.
0 severe regressions (n_severe_regressions == 0). Any severe regression disqualifies CLEAN -- see stop_conditions_for_31BZ.severity_routing.severe for the appropriate PARTIAL classification.
no Q2_K / SDIR blobs committed (all temp under tempfile.mkdtemp)
no scope creep beyond layers 0-27, seeds {0, 9}, no ffn_down residual, no FP16 W_ref
soft_thresholds_with_2_pair_allowance: >= 54/56 cosine-improved (allows up to 2 pairs to fail the cosine-improvement check, as long as they are finite, memory-positive, and non-severe)
>= 54/56 MAE-improved (allows up to 2 pairs to fail the MAE-improvement check, as long as they are finite, memory-positive, and non-severe)

NOTE: the 2-pair allowance for cos+ and the 2-pair allowance for MAE+ are INDEPENDENT. A single pair may fail cos+ AND fail MAE+ and still count as 1 toward each allowance. The CLEAN threshold is met if at most 2 pairs fail cos+ AND at most 2 pairs fail MAE+ (independent of overlap).
success_criteria_for_31BZ.strictness_justification: 54/56 threshold (96.4%) is the same proportional allowance as 31BX's 14/14 (100% -- but only 14 pairs) and 31BV's 6/6 (100% -- but only 6 pairs). Option A's 56 pairs are a 4x increase over 31BX, so a 2-pair allowance reflects the proportional increase in sample size, not a relaxation of the per-pair pass criterion. The HARD criteria (finite, memory-positive, non-severe) carry no allowance because they are pre-conditions for the per-pair result to be meaningful at all -- a non-finite or memory-negative or severe pair is a structural failure, not a soft one.

severity_routing.non_finite: Any non-finite Y_ref / Y_low / Y_sub on any pair disqualifies CLEAN. Routing: 1-2 non-finite pairs => PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_TRADEOFF (or PARTIAL_MINOR_FAILURES if the only failures are non-finite and no other criterion is violated); >= 3 non-finite pairs => BLOCKED (treat as a structural failure of the harness, not a per-pair failure).
severity_routing.memory_negative: Any memory-negative pair or layer disqualifies CLEAN. Routing: ALWAYS PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_MEMORY_FAIL, regardless of count or severity. Memory is the core accounting claim of the policy -- any single memory-negative result breaks the claim.
severity_routing.severe: Any severe regression (delta_cos < -0.05) on any pair disqualifies CLEAN. Routing: ALWAYS PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_TRADEOFF (or PARTIAL_MEMORY_FAIL if the severe pair is also memory-negative), regardless of count.
severity_routing.cos_or_mae_soft_fail: 1-2 pairs not cos+ (and finite, memory-positive, non-severe) => still CLEAN-eligible under the 2-pair cos+ allowance. 3+ pairs not cos+ => CLEAN disqualified, classify PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_MINOR_FAILURES. Same rule independently for MAE+.

stop_immediately_if_BLOCKED: corrected Q2_K encode/dequantize backend fails on any layer (BLOCKED_31BZ_Q2K_BACKEND_FAIL)
SDIR residual encode/decode fails on any pair (BLOCKED_31BZ_SDIR_FAIL)
stop_and_classify_PARTIAL_MEMORY_FAIL_if: ANY single memory-negative pair/layer, regardless of count or other criteria
stop_and_classify_PARTIAL_TRADEOFF_if: any severe regression (delta_cos < -0.05) on any pair (PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_TRADEOFF, unless the severe pair is also memory-negative in which case PARTIAL_MEMORY_FAIL takes precedence)
stop_and_classify_PARTIAL_MINOR_FAILURES: all hard criteria met, 0 severe, all finite, all memory-positive, but 3+ pairs fail cos+ (and not severe)
all hard criteria met, 0 severe, all finite, all memory-positive, but 3+ pairs fail MAE+ (and not severe)
stop_conditions_for_31BZ.classify_CLEAN_if_and_only_if: ALL of: 56/56 finite; 56/56 memory-positive; 0 severe; regression passes before AND after; no model files / blobs committed; no scope creep; AND independently at most 2 pairs fail cos+ (and at most 2 pairs fail MAE+). The 2-pair allowance applies ONLY to the cos+ and MAE+ soft thresholds. Any violation of a hard criterion is CLEAN-disqualifying regardless of cos+/MAE+ counts.

classifications_for_31BZ.PASS_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_FULL_LAYER_TWO_SEED_A: All hard criteria met (regression passes, 56/56 finite, 56/56 memory-positive, 0 severe, no model files, no blobs, no scope creep) AND at most 2 pairs fail cos+ AND at most 2 pairs fail MAE+ (the two allowances are independent).
classifications_for_31BZ.PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_MINOR_FA: All hard criteria met (56/56 finite, 56/56 memory-positive, 0 severe, regression passes) AND no scope-creep / model-file / blob violations, but 3+ pairs fail cos+ OR 3+ pairs fail MAE+ (the allowances are exceeded).
classifications_for_31BZ.PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_TRADEOFF: 1-2 non-finite pairs (and no memory-negative, no severe), OR any severe regression (delta_cos < -0.05) on any pair (unless memory-negative, in which case PARTIAL_MEMORY_FAIL takes precedence).
classifications_for_31BZ.PARTIAL_31BZ_1_5B_Q2K_AGGREGATE_MEMORY_F: ANY single memory-negative pair or layer, regardless of count or other criteria. Memory-positive is a HARD criterion with no allowance.
classifications_for_31BZ.BLOCKED_31BZ_Q2K_BACKEND_FAIL: corrected Q2_K generation or dequantization fails
classifications_for_31BZ.BLOCKED_31BZ_SDIR_FAIL: SDIR residual generation or application fails
classifications_for_31BZ.BLOCKED_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_REGRESSION: regression fails before or after the run

allowed_if_31BZ_passes: Corrected Q2_K policy remained memory-positive and improved cosine/MAE across a full-layer, two-seed Qwen2.5-1.5B standalone tensor-harness aggregate (28 layers x 2 seeds = 56 pairs).
still_forbidden_even_if_31BZ_passes: no claim that the result transfers to real activations or to a serving stack
no claim that the result transfers to 7B / 14B / 32B / 72B / 110B+ Qwen2.5 or any other family

next_allowed_phase_if_clean: Phase 31BZ -- Qwen2.5-1.5B Corrected Q2_K Full-Layer Two-Seed Aggregate, only if explicitly requested
next_allowed_phase_if_blocked: Phase 31BY-R -- Aggregate Planning Repair, only if explicitly requested
classification_reason: Three prior accepted phases (31BU/31BV/31BX) all PASS; 23 cumulative pairs with 0 severe, 0 memory-fail, 0 finite-fail; L0 bit-identical across three independent runners; worst observed delta_cos still strongly positive; full-layer coverage at the same two seeds is the next bounded step in a controlled step ladder. Option A selected with strict but proportional success criteria.
